prompt: Create a comic book cover featuring this character in space.
prompt_refined: Generate a dynamic comic book cover featuring the character from image 1: a cartoon-style superhero in a lime green and dark green suit, wearing a white VR headset with blue screens, and holding white VR controllers. Position this character prominently in the foreground, in an action pose as if navigating a virtual world within the vastness of outer space. The background should depict a vibrant cosmic scene with swirling nebulae, distant stars, and planets. Include a bold, stylized comic book title at the top, and a publisher logo space at the bottom right. The overall aesthetic should be that of a classic comic book illustration.
objects: White VR headset with blue screens
Bold, stylized comic book title at the top
Publisher logo space at the bottom right
